Name: Magic Arrow
Info: Deals damage to the specified creature

Name: Bloodlust
Info: Increases the selected friendly unit's melee attack

Name: Curse
Info: The selected enemy target has its damage reduced to the minimum possible if there is a scatter

Name: Protection From Fire
Info: Selected friendly unit takes Base% less damage from fire spells

Name: Blind
Info: Enemy target skips turns until attacked. After the spell is removed by an attack, the creature's first counterattack deals only Base% damage

Name: Fireball
Info: In the specified 7 hex area, all creatures take damage

Name: Misfortune
Info: The Luck of the selected enemy target is reduced by Base, but not below -3

Name: Armageddon
Info: Deals damage to all creatures and battle vehicles on the battlefield

Name: Fire Shield
Info: Applies to an allied creature. The opponent who attacked the creature with the shield gets Base% of the damage back

Name: Inferno
Info: In the specified 14 hex area, all creatures take damage

Name: Summon Fire Elemental
Info: Summons a squad of Fire elementals to the battlefield. Elementals are summoned to the hexes of the first row of the battlefield, or to the next rows if it is occupied. After combat, all Summoned elementals disappear, You cannot summon two different kinds of elementals in one battle

Name: Bless
Info: The selected friendly target's damage is increased to the maximum possible damage if there is a scatter

Name: Cure
Info: Restores the health of the selected friendly target . This spell does not resurrect dead creatures. It removes all negative spells
Formula: Heal = Spell_Power * Scaling + Base; Target_Current_HP = min(Target_Max_HP, Target_Current_HP + Heal)

Name: Dispell
Info: Removes all spells and effects from a friendly squad. Removes Antimagic. Works even on creatures that are immune to magic

Name: Protection From Water
Info: Selected friendly unit takes Base% less damage from water spells

Name: Ice Bolt
Info: Deals damage equal to the specified creature

Name: Weakness
Info: Reduces the attack of the selected enemy unit by Base points, but not below 0

Name: Forgetfulness
Info: Said enemy shooter deals Base% less damage in melee and ranged combat

Name: Frost Ring
Info: All creatures around the specified hex, not including the center hex, take damage. Target may be an empty hex

Name: Mirth
Info: Increases the morale of the specified friendly unit by Base point, but no more than +3

Name: Clone
Info: Creates a clone of a selected friendly unit of level 1-5 on an adjacent hex. The clone has all the abilities of the base creature except Efreet Fire shield, Vampirism, and Phoenix Rebirth. The clone disappears when it takes any damage or when the cloned unit is killed
Formula: New_Unit = Clone(Target); New_Unit.Flags = {Temporary, Disappear_On_Hit, Disappear_On_Attack}; Link_To_Source(New_Unit, Target)

Name: Prayer
Info: The attack, defense, and speed of the chosen friendly creature are increased by Base points.
Formula: Target_Attack = Target_Attack + Base; Target_Defense = Target_Defense + Base; Target_Speed = Target_Speed + Base

Name: Summon Water Elemental
Info: Summons a squad of Water elementals to the battlefield. Elementals are summoned to the hexes of the first row of the battlefield, or to the next rows if it is occupied. After combat, all Summoned elementals disappear, You cannot summon two different kinds of elementals in one battle

Name: Haste
Info: The speed of the selected friendly unit is increased by Base points

Name: Fortune
Info: The luck of the selected friendly target is increased by Base, but not higher than +3

Name: Lightning Bolt
Info: Deals damage  to the specified creature

Name: Precision
Info: Ranged attack is increased by Base points for the specified friendly shooter

Name: Protection From Air
Info: Selected friendly unit takes Base% less damage from air spells

Name: Air Shield
Info: The selected friendly unit takes Base% less damage from shooters and combat vehicles

Name: Destroy Undead
Info: Deals damage  to all undead  on the battlefield

Name: Summon Air Elemental
Info: Summons a squad of Air elementals to the battlefield. Elementals are summoned to the hexes of the first row of the battlefield, or to the next rows if it is occupied. After combat, all Summoned elementals disappear, You cannot summon two different kinds of elementals in one battle

Name: Shield
Info: Said friendly creature takes Base% less melee damage

Name: Slow
Info: The speed of said enemy creature is reduced by Base%

Name: Stone Skin
Info: The defense of the specified friendly unit is increased by Base points

Name: Death Ripple
Info: All creatures on the battlefield except undead and combat vehicles take damage

Name: Protection From Earth
Info: Selected friendly unit takes Base% less damage from earth spells

Name: Animate Dead
Info: Resurrects and heals creatures in the squad, where at least one creature died, by the amount of health. Only works on undead
Formula: Heal = Spell_Power * Scaling + Base; Total_HP = Heal; Revived_Units = floor(Total_HP / Unit_Max_HP); Remaining_HP = Total_HP % Unit_Max_HP

Name: Anti-Magic
Info: Gives the selected friendly unit immunity to spells. If the creature already has these spells on it, they are lost

Name: Meteor Shower
Info: In the specified 7 hex area, all creatures take damage

Name: Resurrection
Info: Resurrects and heals creatures in the squad, where at least one creature died, by a health value.  Only works on living creatures
Formula: Heal = Spell_Power * Scaling + Base; Total_HP = Heal; Revived_Units = floor(Total_HP / Unit_Max_HP); Remaining_HP = Total_HP % Unit_Max_HP

Name: Sorrow
Info: Reduces the morale of the specified enemy unit by Base point, but no lower than -3

Name: Implosion
Info: Deals damage to the specified creature

Name: Summon Earth Elemental
Info: Summons a squad of Earth elementals to the battlefield. Elementals are summoned to the hexes of the first row of the battlefield, or to the next rows if it is occupied. After combat, all Summoned elementals disappear, You cannot summon two different kinds of elementals in one battle
